blockingIssues.description: The new Mermaid diagrams still document the legacy quote-ticket/PvmQuoteProbe borrow architecture instead of the post-M6 unified risk gateway that milestone 8 was required to present honestly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit architecture-audit step for documentation features: when editing Mermaid diagrams, failure modes, or execution-flow prose, cross-check current contract names and the canonical execution path against the current codebase plus AGENTS milestone constraints before finalizing wording.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The architecture-diagrams review found README diagrams still using `RiskAdapter (quote ticket publication)` and a primary `RiskAdapter -> PvmQuoteProbe -> QuoteTicket` borrow flow, while failure-mode-docs described inline deterministic math as a fallback. Both mismatches conflict with milestone-6's unified risk gateway and AGENTS.md's instruction that milestone-8 docs must reflect the post-M6 architecture.
